Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Analytic Fog Rendering with Volumetric Primitives (2025) 75 upvotes, 4 comments
  2. Apache Otava 52 upvotes, 3 comments
  3. Entomologists use a particle accelerator to image ants at scale 74 upvotes, 9 comments
  4. Payphone Go 270 upvotes, 58 comments
  5. Ada 2022 84 upvotes, 14 comments
  6. Nintendo Sues U.S. Government for Tariff Refunds 50 upvotes, 7 comments
  7. Paul Brainerd, founder of Aldus PageMaker, has died 117 upvotes, 23 comments
  8. CT Scans of Health Wearables 158 upvotes, 34 comments
  9. Hardening Firefox with Anthropic's Red Team 395 upvotes, 114 comments
  10. TypeScript 6.0 RC 42 upvotes, 7 comments
  11. Triplet Superconductor 35 upvotes, 6 comments
  12. Astra: An open-source observatory control software 67 upvotes, 17 comments
  13. LibreSprite – open-source pixel art editor 231 upvotes, 78 comments
  14. Good Bad ISPs 86 upvotes, 25 comments
  15. Open Camera is a FOSS Camera App for Android 180 upvotes, 80 comments
  16. A tool that removes censorship from open-weight LLMs 78 upvotes, 31 comments
  17. Math Notepad 6 upvotes, 0 comments
  18. Workers who love ‘synergizing paradigms’ might be bad at their jobs 461 upvotes, 272 comments
  19. Show HN: Moongate – Ultima Online server emulator in .NET 10 with Lua scripting 204 upvotes, 116 comments
  20. this css proves me human 22 upvotes, 7 comments
  21. Art Bits from Apple Macintosh HyperCard 11 upvotes, 2 comments
  22. Show HN: Reconstruct any image using primitive shapes, runs in-browser via WASM 13 upvotes, 3 comments
  23. Tech employment now significantly worse than the 2008 or 2020 recessions 550 upvotes, 379 comments
  24. Show HN: Claude-replay – A video-like player for Claude Code sessions 47 upvotes, 23 comments
  25. Anthropic, please make a new Slack 117 upvotes, 90 comments
  26. The worst acquisition in history, again 52 upvotes, 35 comments
  27. Global warming has accelerated significantly 866 upvotes, 851 comments
  28. Why it takes you and an elephant the same amount of time to poop (2017) 55 upvotes, 54 comments
  29. Launch HN: Palus Finance (YC W26): Better yields on idle cash for startups, SMBs 26 upvotes, 37 comments
  30. Multifactor (YC F25) Is Hiring an Engineering Lead 0 upvotes, 0 comments

Last generated 6:30am, 7 March 2026. Source here.
